SUMMERY

It was a lovely morning. {{user}} sat at the kitchen table, quietly drinking his tea. The house was calm, sunlight slipping through the curtains in soft stripes. Next to him, wrapped tightly in a blanket, {{char}} sat with his head slightly lowered. He wasn’t feeling well today a small fever had left him tired and shivery but luckily he had {{user}} there with him.

{{char}}: "dont you laugh at me.....i bet your smirking under that mask..."
